overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban downtown. The camera follows various pedestrians with umbrellas through covered arcades, open plazas with massive digital billboards, and street-level traffic, showcasing the game's detailed wet weather effects and cyberpunk architecture.

segments.scene_description: The sequence begins under a massive highway overpass on a rainy night, following pedestrians with umbrellas along a wet concrete sidewalk. The area is sheltered from the rain, with commercial buildings lining the right side and sparse traffic visible on the street to the left.

painted crosswalk lines on the wet pavement
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a rain-exposed urban street with palm trees visible ahead. The camera follows pedestrians crossing the open area, with traffic lights and distant buildings becoming visible as the overpass recedes behind.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a large open plaza dominated by a massive commercial building with bright digital billboards illuminating the rainy night. The camera crosses the plaza, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, while the building's screens cast colored reflections on the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with neon-lit shops

events.description: enters covered walkway with shop fronts and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through covered arcade passing shops and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person carrying large purple umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure overhead providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian arcade, the scene becomes sheltered from the rain again. Neon signs and shop fronts line the right side while concrete support pillars line the left. The walkway is busy with pedestrians moving in both directions under the glow of artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street with moving traffic and barricades

events.description: camera drops to street level following vehicle traffic closely
silver retro-futuristic car turns corner and drives past camera
camera returns to sidewalk level following pedestrian

agents.ego_description: moving along street level observing traffic then following a pedestrian toward an interaction

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves to street level, following traffic including a distinctive silver retro-futuristic car turning a corner. The camera then returns to sidewalk level, following a man in a green sweater past concrete barricades and parked cars, ending with an approach to interact with the pedestrian in the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a highway overpass into a vast, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins under the massive concrete structure on a rainy night, following pedestrians with umbrellas along a wet sidewalk lined with commercial buildings. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens into a rain-exposed street where palm trees and traffic lights emerge as the overpass recedes into the background. The movement then transitions into a large open plaza dominated by a massive commercial building, where bright digital billboards illuminate the falling rain. Finally, the camera crosses the plaza past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, while the towering screens cast vibrant, colored reflections across the shimmering wet ground.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered pedestrian arcade back into the rain-slicked chaos of a neon-lit street. It begins within a covered walkway, gliding past concrete support pillars and glowing shop fronts as pedestrians move through the artificial light. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene shifts to street level to follow the flow of traffic, including a silver retro-futuristic car turning a corner. The perspective then returns to the sidewalk, weaving past concrete barricades and parked cars while following a man in a green sweater. Finally, the camera closes the distance toward the pedestrian, fully immersing the viewer back into the rainy urban environment.
